retrieved_sources.snippet: # Billing Policy Billing disputes should be reviewed carefully before making any promise to the customer. Common billing issues include incorrect invoice amount, duplicate charges, missing discounts, unexpected renewal fees, and tax calculation problems. retrieved_sources.snippet: # Technical Outage Guide A technical outage should be treated as urgent when the customer reports that the service is unavailable, business-critical workflows are blocked, or multiple users are affected. Enterprise customer outages should be treated as critical by default. The operations team should check whether the issue is isolated to one user, one customer account, one region, or the entire service. Recommended next steps include checking system status, collecting affected user information, identifying the start time of the issue, and escalating to the engineering on-call team when busines

retrieved_sources.snippet: # Escalation Matrix Escalation is required when the issue has high business impact, legal risk, cancellation risk, enterprise customer impact, or unresolved repeated complaints.
